name: forgetfulino-arduino-ide-extension
description: Generate Forgetfulino headers automatically from the Arduino IDE 2.x editor.

forgetfulino.libraryRoot.markdownDescription: Optional. Absolute path to the `Forgetfulino` Arduino library folder. If empty, the extension tries to auto-detect it from the Arduino IDE context (Sketchbook/libraries/Forgetfulino).

forgetfulino.autoGenerateOnSave.markdownDescription: If true, generate headers whenever a `.ino`, `.cpp`, or `.c` file is saved.

forgetfulino.pythonCommand.markdownDescription: Optional. Python command/path to run the generator (e.g. `python3`, `python`, `py -3`, or an absolute path). If empty, the extension will try common commands.
